nodes.label: AI as collaborative drafting tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous task executor
nodes.grounding_span: it is always collaborative when I use AI. I never entirely delegate tasks to it.

nodes.label: AI output personalization effort
nodes.grounding_span: edit it to make it sound more like my writing style

nodes.label: Enjoyment of manual organization
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy the process of organizing things myself.

nodes.label: Skill maintenance vs. AI reliance
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI leading to skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: I think it is important to maintain those skills, otherwise AI will take over.

nodes.label: Realistic expectations of AI imperfection
nodes.grounding_span: I know it is an imperfect system and do not have the expectation of perfection from it.

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: saves me a couple minutes here and there

nodes.label: Personal authenticity and self-expression
nodes.grounding_span: make it sound more like my writing style

nodes.label: Autonomy and control over work
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy the process of organizing things myself.

nodes.label: Human competence and independence
nodes.grounding_span: maintain those skills, otherwise AI will take over

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I do feel satisfied when it produces high quality email responses for me though because that saves me a couple minutes here and there.

nodes.label: Absence of frustration due to realistic expectations
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI has ever frustrated me, because I know it is an imperfect system

nodes.label: Concern about AI over-reliance and skill loss
nodes.grounding_span: people are becoming very reliant on AI which is why that path is being paved (the path for AI to take over)

nodes.label: Openness to future collaborative expansion
nodes.grounding_span: as it improves, I will be able to collaborate in more ways than just for email communications.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I read it over and ask it to adjust the tone, length, or details as necessary.

nodes.label: Preference for hands-on, methodical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I simply enjoy the simple repetitive nature of it.
